zh.Saint-Symphorien, Sarthe, Pays de la Loi: 法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特沙吉福利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Patrick de Chaworth於大約1093年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特沙吉福利時，他的父親Patrick de Chaources43歲，母親Mathilda de Hesdin30歲。他於大約1122年與Wilberga de Mundubleau在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1155年之前在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾肯普斯福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Patrick de Chaworth于大约1093年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特沙吉福利时，他的父亲Patrick de Chaources43岁，母亲Mathilda de Hesdin30岁。他于大约1122年与Wilberga de Mundubleau在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1155年之前在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾肯普斯福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chaworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Haworth (Yorkshire), probably from Old English haga ‘hedge, enclosure’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Howarth
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Howarth in Rochdale (Lancashire), possibly from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + worth ‘enclosure’. The name may have been confused with Haworth .

nameMeanings.name: Patrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name of the apostle and patron saint of Ireland ( c.389–461 ), Gaelic Pádraig. He was a Christian Briton and a Roman citizen, who as a young man was captured and enslaved by raiders from Ireland. He escaped and went to Gaul before returning home to Britain. In about 419 he felt a call to do missionary work in Ireland. He studied for twelve years at Auxerre, and in 432 returned to Ireland. For the rest of his life it is difficult to distinguish fact from fiction. He apparently went to the court of the high kings at Tara and made some converts there; then he travelled around Ireland making further converts until about 445 , when he established his archiepiscopal see at Armagh. By the time of his death almost the whole of Ireland is said to have been converted to Christianity. He is also credited with codifying the laws of Ireland. In his Latin autobiography, as well as in later tradition, his name appears as Patricius ‘patrician’ (i.e. belonging to the Roman senatorial or noble class), but this may actually represent a Latinized form of some lost Celtic (British) name. In Ireland in particular, it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When Patrick de Chaworth was born about 1093, in Saint-Symphorien, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Patrick de Chaources, was 43 and his mother, Mathilda de Hesdin, was 30. He married Wilberga de Mundubleau about 1122, in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died before 1155, in Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Patrick de Chaworth est né environ 1093, à Saint-Symphorien, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Patrick de Chaources, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Mathilda de Hesdin, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Wilberga de Mundubleau environ 1122, à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé avant 1155, à Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Saint-Symphorien, Sarthe, Pays de la Loi: Saint-Symphorien, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Patrick de Chaworth um 1093 in Saint-Symphorien, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Patrick de Chaources 43 und seine Mutter Mathilda de Hesdin 30. Er hat um 1122 in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Wilberga de Mundubleau geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb vor 1155 in Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick de Chaworth è nato il circa 1093 nel Saint-Symphorien, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, il suo padre, Patrick de Chaources, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Mathilda de Hesdin, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Wilberga de Mundubleau circa 1122, nel Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì prima del 1155, nel Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Patrick de Chaworthが約1093年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーサルスサイント-シンフォーインで生まれた時，父Patrick de Chaourcesは43歳，母Mathilda de Hesdinは30歳であった。約1122年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターでWilberga de Mundubleauと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1155年以前にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアケンプスフォードで死去した。

ko.Saint-Symphorien, Sarthe, Pays de la Loi: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 세인트-시포리
ko.lifeSummary: Patrick de Chaworth(이)가 대략 1093년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 세인트-시포리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Patrick de Chaources(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilda de Hesdin(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1122년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에서 Wilberga de Mundubleau(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1155년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 케프스퍼드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick de Chaworth nasceu aproximadamente 1093, em Saint-Symphorien, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Patrick de Chaources, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Mathilda de Hesdin, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Wilberga de Mundubleau aproximadamente 1122, em Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 1155, em Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Saint-Symphorien, Sarthe, Pays de la Loi: сеинт-симфауриен, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Patrick de Chaworth родился около 1093 г. в местности сеинт-симфауриен, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Patrick de Chaources было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilda de Hesdin, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Wilberga de Mundubleau около 1122 г. в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер перед 1155 г. в местности кемпсфорд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
